---
title: "Stefan Eng"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - text: "Google Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=JGttqjsAAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: "ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-5245-6507
    - icon: github
      text: "GitHub"
      href: https://github.com/stefaneng
    - icon: linkedin
      text: "LinkedIn"
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/stefaneng13/
---

I'm a Ph.D student in Biostatistics at the University of Michigan working with [Dr. Jean Morrison](https://sph.umich.edu/faculty-profiles/morrison-jean.html) and [Dr. Veera Baladandayuthapani](https://sph.umich.edu/faculty-profiles/baladandayuthapani-veerabhadran.html).
